name: On The Road! | Elmer + Rose
description:
Aniyah is throwing a house warming party at her new beach home!

So a party has banded of students from Elmer College
and Rose Academy for a week long road trip!

🚌🚐🚗🚌🚐🚗🚌🚐🚗🚌🚐🚗

This trip will be a long stretch through different terrain, plenty of places to stop
and enjoy yourselves, fuel up, or just relax a bit.

This is a collaborative effort between me and the beautiful @SexyQueenFaeye, thank you to her for allowing me to smush our worlds together and bring you something memorable. All credits go to her for her Rose Academy characters and their vehicle ideas. <3

Go give her a follow please she deserves it. She be working hard to make y'all happy campers.

Be sure to check out the other collab on her account, she worked very hard on that as well, it has Neith, Lenora, and Talia in it. <3 (CLICK HERE)

🚌🚐🚗🚌🚐🚗🚌🚐🚗🚌🚐🚗

Exterior:



Description: Beatrice’s Mother’s RV motor-home, a 2026 white and gray Axis Motorhome. The main living space of the home has a stove, a sink, a microwave, a fridge, cabinets, a couch with built in coffee table, a small, wall mounted TV, a small shower and toilet, and a closet. The front of the home has a driver and passenger seat with a coffee table in the center, radio and GPS navigation. The rear of the home has 2 twin sized beds that can also fold out into a singular king sized bed.
